intro: Nephrodium nigritanum, also known as the Black Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, gout, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Nephrodium nigritanum include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
